data.title: Negative equity mortgages in Hong Kong decreased by 32% to 21,304 in Q4 2025, down from 31,449, indicating a property market stabilization post stamp duty removal.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has reported a decrease in negative equity mortgage cases to 21,304 in the fourth quarter of 2025, a notable decline from the previous figure of 31,449. This decrease is seen as a positive indicator of recovery in the Hong Kong property market. The improvement comes following the removal of stamp duty, indicating a positive trend in the market's performance.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.36 rebound from $0.32 support. Short-term target: $0.36, medium-term: $0.30-$0.42. Key levels $0.30 and $0.42.
data.description: Summary of ADA Price Predictions: In the short term, the target for ADA is $0.36 within a week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast ranges between $0.30 and $0.42 over the next month. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.42, while a critical support level lies at $0.30. Despite fluctuations, analysts predict positive movements for ADA in the near future.

data.title: FICO report shows lower year-on-year spending in UK credit card market for November 2025, with average balances rising.
data.description: In November 2025, a recent analysis by FICO, a global analytics software leader listed on the NYSE as FICO, on credit card data revealed that spending, balances, and payments adhered to seasonal patterns leading up to Christmas. Despite a typical rise in spending during November, the figures were lower compared to the previous year, indicating sustained financial strain on households. The average balances showed an increase, as payment rates hit the lowest point since 2021. Additionally, overlimit usage also saw a spike in numbers.

data.title: December saw a 7.1% rise in HK mortgage approvals despite lower applications. HKMA approves HK$31.2B mortgages, hinting at property market revival.
data.description: In December 2025, Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) reported approving HK$31.2 billion in mortgages. This comes as a positive indicator for Hong Kong's property market, which had been experiencing a four-year slump. The approved mortgage amount signifies a potential revival in the property sector, hinting at increasing confidence among buyers and investors. The turnaround in the market demonstrates a promising shift and a potential economic recovery for Hong Kong.

data.title: XRP expected to hit $2.60 by year-end despite current bearish trend, with RSI at 33.20. Analysts project $2.60-$4.00 by 2026.
data.description: XRP is currently experiencing a period of consolidation around $1.75, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) showing oversold conditions at 33.20. Analysts are anticipating a potential recovery towards the range of $2.60 to $4.00 by the end of 2026, citing a technical reset in the market.

data.title: $400M in cryptocurrency forfeited to DOJ in Helix Bitcoin mixer case, closing a probe into its 2014-2017 operations.
data.description: In a recent development, a conclusive court ruling has resulted in the transfer of ownership of seized cryptocurrency and assets to the United States government. This decision marks the culmination of a case linked to Helix’s activities during the period spanning from 2014 to 2017. The transfer encompasses a substantial value of cryptocurrency and assets being handed over to the US authorities, solidifying the outcome of the legal proceedings.
